---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

> A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

> What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?
> Example: "As an emergency responder, I need to [do X] so that [Y]."

## Proposed Solution

> Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

> Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Phase

> Which development phase does this belong to?
- [ ] Phase A1 — Foundation (no features)
- [ ] Phase A2 — BLE + Encryption
- [ ] Phase A3 — LoRa + Store & Forward
- [ ] Phase A4 — Maps + Voice + QR Pairing
- [ ] Phase A5 — Emergency + Dashboard
- [ ] Future / Post-v1.0

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (safety/emergency functionality)
- [ ] High (core communication feature)
- [ ] Medium (UX improvement)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Additional Context

> Screenshots, mockups, or links to related documentation.
